task_completion.description: Navigate to and open the Sales Region window.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window, tab, or menu item titled 'Sales Region' is open and active in the application interface.

task_completion.description: Enter the required Search Key, Name, and Description for the new Sales Region.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields show Search Key (or Value) as 'PNW', Name as 'Pacific North West', and Description containing 'Territory covering WA, OR, and ID'.

task_completion.description: Save the newly created Sales Region record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Record Saved' notification, a clicked save button, or the form transitioning to a saved/view state for the 'Pacific North West' region.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Business Partner window and open the record for 'Joe Block'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Business Partner' window is open, and the record details for 'Joe Block' are displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Assign the new Sales Region to Joe Block.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Business Partner record for Joe Block, the 'Sales Region' field is set to 'Pacific North West' (or 'PNW') and the record is saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser and the iDempiere/ERP web interface, not terminal commands or API calls.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database queries to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows open with psql, SQL scripts, or python scripts executing database INSERT/UPDATE commands.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered the data into the application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Text is visible inside the actual input fields of the ERP system, rather than just being copy-pasted into a text editor or notes app.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected Sales Region Search Key is 'PNW'. The expected Name is 'Pacific North West'. The Description must contain 'Territory covering'. The target Business Partner to assign this region to is exactly 'Joe Block'.
